message:
feat(cli): add new command completions, BM25 offline search, and fix registry merge priority

Shell completions (completion.ts):
- Register 8 new commands (recommend, cost, impact, graph, packs,
  dedupe, config, random) with their option flags for tab-completion

Offline library integration (save.ts):
- After saving a prompt to the server, immediately update the local
  offline library cache so it's available without waiting for next sync
- Upsert logic handles both new saves and updates to existing prompts
- Update sync metadata prompt count to stay consistent

Search improvements (search.ts):
- Replace naive searchOfflineLibrary with proper BM25-based search
  using the same buildIndex/searchPrompts pipeline as local search
- Offline prompts are now scored with full-text relevance ranking
  including field-matched highlighting

Registry loader priority fix (registry-loader.ts):
- Correct the merge order so offline (saved) prompts take precedence
  over remote/cached/bundled prompts rather than being overwritten
- New order: cache/remote -> packs -> offline -> local (was offline
  being merged first, then overwritten by later sources)
- Applied consistently across all 6 merge paths in loadRegistry and
  refreshRegistry

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 ] as const;
 
 const COMMAND_OPTIONS: Record<string, string[]> = {
@@ -74,6 +82,14 @@ const COMMAND_OPTIONS: Record<string, string[]> = {
   completion: ["--shell"],
   serve: ["--config"],
   "update-cli": ["--check", "--force", "--json"],
+  recommend: ["--limit", "--prefer-tags", "--prefer-categories", "--exclude-tags", "--exclude-categories", "--json"],
+  cost: ["--model", "--input-tokens", "--output-tokens", "--price-in", "--price-out", "--list-models", "--alerts", "--alerts-limit", "--json"],
+  impact: ["--json"],
+  graph: ["--format", "--include-meta", "--include-collections", "--json"],
+  packs: ["--installed", "--tool", "--json"],
+  dedupe: ["--min-score", "--limit", "--json"],
+  config: ["--json"],
+  random: ["--category", "--tag", "--copy", "--json"],
 };
 
 const GLOBAL_OPTIONS = ["--help", "--version"];
